### Overview
_(brief description of work request)_

### Business Need
_(what business need does this support and what might happen if we do not complete this task)_

### Technical Approach
_(how might we approach completing this work)_

### Acceptance Criteria
_(what must be complete in order to close this ticket)_

**Clockify Project**:

**Priority Score**:

(urgency + impact) / effort
 
_Urgency: How time sensitive is this work? 5 is most urgent_
_Impact: How many people are affected and how severely? 5 is greatest impact_
_Effort: How much work does this require from the team? 5 is greatest amount of effort_
